mechanism: Platform services use only consumption-based pricing tiers with no idle cost. Flat-rate and reserved-capacity services are not eligible.
why: Flat-rate services accrue cost at idle — fixed overhead accumulates independent of activity and cannot be attributed to application value.

related.note: Container App Jobs are consumption-based — zero cost when idle.
Zero platform idle cost ensures billing reflects actual use, not shared overhead.
30-day retention keeps Log Analytics within the free storage tier.

violations: Azure Container Registry as platform image registry — fixed monthly cost.
Automation on a reserved App Service Plan — baseline cost at idle.
Private endpoint in a landing zone — fixed hourly cost per endpoint.
